prompt: Generate a city growth story map. Use Image 1 as the silhouette frame, filling one side with Image 2 (historic city view) and the other side with Image 3 (modern skyline) to show urban expansion over time.
prompt_refined: Generate an infographic illustrating urban expansion over time. Use Image 1 as the overarching silhouette boundary for the composition. Within this silhouette, depict a historic urban scene on the left side, drawing visual style and elements from Image 2 (a bustling street market with people and traditional carts). On the right side of the silhouette, integrate a modern city landscape, incorporating the architectural style and futuristic feel of Image 3 (a sleek cityscape with towering glass buildings and complex illuminated roadways). The overall image should visually represent the progression from past to present urban development within the defined shape.
objects: Historic urban scene on the left
Bustling street market on the left
People in historic attire on the left
Modern city landscape on the right
Towering glass buildings on the right
Complex illuminated roadways on the right
Visual representation of urban development progression
